reviews.review_description: I’m very upset. I bought this game a while ago, and when I logged in today, it kept loading and wouldn’t run. I hope someone can see this and help resolve the problem.

I’ve had this game for years. It is by far the best dance game ever. So much fun with such awesome characters and a fu n storyline. 

Unfortunately due to the inability to save my game it has become tedious. Every launch is a reset. 

So, I decided to get Just Dance when it launched.  And ugh.  It sucks in comparison.  Hardly any songs, no ability to create a playlist, overdone graphics for no reason. It’s a shambles. 

Sorry to say, but if you are looking for a great dance game this was the only one. Really wish the developers would fix the bug so we can get back to an awesome game.

reviews.review_title: PC vers broke too - broken on purpose?
reviews.review_description:
This game used to be good and like most others I'm sad it's gone. I will admit I'm a bit suspicious though that maybe there's some kind of online server check it used to do, since the breaking issue (being stuck on the starting logo forever) happens on both platforms, even though Quest (which is modified Android) and Windows PC are drastically different platforms. What are the chances this game would have the exact same game-breaking bug on two drastically different platforms in that way? Something's up here -- what'd you do, Harmonix?

---

Yeah the more I'm digging into it, my opinion is that they purposefully broke this game with an update, most likely as a result of the Epic buyout. 7 months ago there was an "update" to v1.2.2 with no information available, and that seems to be when the issues reported in all recent reviews started. I've read reports online that those who manage to get older versions on their quest can still get it to work. v1.2.2 seems to have been specifically pushed out to break this game, in my opinion. I think something fishy went on with why this is broken and no longer works, it doesn't look like it was an accident.

---

Ok so I've been digging even deeper, and it looks like the v1.2.2 update came out after the game was already delisted, which is very strange. Based on older reviews here, Reddit threads, and a statement from Epic, I think this game effectively broke on Jan 24 2023, and just got worse from there. At some point it was delisted. THEN they applied the 1.2.2 update about 7 months ago from now, which did not fix anything, and had no notes. I still can't make full sense of it but I'm gonna keep digging into it and see what I can figure out, ideally I'll eventually have a full timeline. I might make it a youtube video to summarize everything once I figure it all out.

reviews.review_title: Not able to get into the game fix
reviews.review_description:
Here is a fix for people getting stuck not able to get into menu after installing the game.

Prerequisites

Make sure you enable dev mode on Quest (Instructions online)

Make sure no user has the game installed so if you have multiple users it has to be uninstalled on all users

Make sure it you did have the game installed at one point and the game is not currently installed on any user and you install a file manager on Quest (instructions to install a file manager on Quest are online)

Make sure you go into the file manager and in the root of storage you find the dance central folder and inside you delete the save file inside

How to get Dance Central working on Quest (complete prerequisites first)

1 Install SideQuest on the Quest (There are tutorials online and you can even install SideQuest to the Quest to use it directly on Quest without another device to install from SideQuest)

2 Install QuestAppVersionSwitcher from SideQuest

3 Once installed launch QuestAppVersionSwitcher

4 Click where it says Beat Saber and change it to other and hit start

5 Make sure to go into the settings and link your quest account

6 Go to Downgrade and in the search remove Beat Saber and search dance central and hit the button that says search

7 Find it in the list and hit details

8 Download the version right before the latest version

9 Hit install and go through all the menus making sure to accept that you want to restore data

10 Once installed launch the game and select update later and wait until you actually get to the point where you can actually start playing the game which is when you can see you are in a club

11 Exit the game and make sure you relaunch it this time selecting update now and wait for it to update

12 After the game updates launch the game and it should now work fine except for online which does not work at the moment
Great game although wish you could intact, with the characters another way like go shopping or cafe and go other places .
I found it boring

I’m a huge fan and hope they add expansions for this game! With clubs closed in the real this let’s you hit a VR one from your home. DAaaance Baaatttlllesss! If you’ve spent a few nights in clubs you’ll immediately feel familiar with the cast of characters (they have far less drama then their real counterparts). Even better is no pushing through crowds, no smelling like cloves, no spending your rent on drinks, and no hangover the next day. I’m currently early in the story but plan on taking my time to enjoy the cast interactions... and hoping future expansions (added clubs, control w/just hands, etc.) are in the pipeline.
It’s so fun
This game is soo fun and so addicting! I am not a great dancer at all, in fact no one could ever get me on the dance floor. But this Game makes me want to dance all night!
I love the game but there should be more updates and new songs put up more frequently.
Great game for a first timer. I wish instead of starting at the beginning everytime,  I could continue from where I left off.

This is a great game for people of all ages. Entertainment for hours and the calories burned are ridiculous! My husband and I have been married over 30 years and have a blast challenging the younger generations to dance battles. The awesome thing is, they never really know they are going up against old people in their 50s! This game is a trip and was on sale for $15 when we bought it so it was a great buy and a must have for the multiplayer gaming apps.
It should allow us to preview each song before play.
I love the game but I wish there was an option to save 🙄
I have a brand new VR I bought the demo of this game and it worked great I bought the full version and it has yet to load even after several different days of trying

I’m honestly shocked I got so into this game as I have such bad rhythm on instruments. Normally I’d avoid this as I am more attracted to things like orbusvr or shooters on vr but I’m simply eager to get back to the dance after the quest charges. So far this game is worth every dollar.
It is really fun. It has worn me out. My want to stretch first

developer_response.body: We love that you're feeling the burn. If you haven't already, check out the Fitness app on your in-game phone as well to track your approximate progress while you dance!

reviews.review_description: This game gets you going. It’s fun and addictive. I love to dance; at hole alone. No need to worry if I’m making a fool of myself. I’m having fun and sweating my buns off.
I am absolutely in love with this game. If you love dancing, get this!! It’s like a workout too! My favorite game now!

Just bought the game and haven't been able to get past the starting point tried reinstalling 3 different times after I turned it off and back on nothing what's the point in charging ppl if u can't get your game working right apparently I'm not the only one with the issue

I’m new to Oculus and VR in general. Being said, this game is a lot of fun and a great workout. However, like other reviews, I really REALLY wish there were more songs. And I hate to pull the Rockband card, but if we could get a deeper catalog, that would be cool. I’m still gonna dance tho- this game is dope.

reviews.review_title: What a fun dance and exercise game!
reviews.review_description: This is an awesome dance/exercise game overall, while I like the songs there needs to be more of a variety of music.  The game however keeps me very engaged and sweating.
Game play is fun, but casting to App or a Chromecast produces high pitched audio that is terrible. Developers need to fix the issues with this.

I am so happy I get to finally play the new version of DC, I use to play the older games and loved the characters and now it really feels like I am interacting with them and it makes me so happy! It takes time getting use to the new dances but once you get the hang of it it’s so fun!!

This game is great. I am a newbie to VR and Oculus quest 2.  The visuals, sound, and locations are incredible.  It feels so real. I love dancing. It may take a while to use all the elements of the game, but I'll dance all the way there

These are just some suggestions for the dance game other than that it’s super fun! It would be nice if there was some kind of recording system like connect for Xbox where it could record and monitor your moves without the controllers!  It would be cool if that was an option!  The controllers kind of get in the way especially when your going from a fist to snapping and than open hands! Also the headset can start hurting after a while and I always have red cheeks and forehead after!  I’m worried it’s gonna start creating a crease in my forehead!  I have a tiny head so I wish it was lighter and smaller!
